title: Load a valid asset and see Overview metrics plus Neon Quant chart
description: This test verifies a user can select a valid market/asset, load historical data, and see the Overview metrics and the primary Neon Quant Plotly chart populated for the selected asset.

steps.description: Toggle the sidebar open if it is collapsed
Load historical data for the selected asset
Verify Overview key metrics are displayed
Verify a Neon Quant styled Plotly price chart is displayed for the selected asset

title: Switching between multiple tabs does not break the base chart session
description: This test verifies that the baseline Plotly chart continues to render and remain usable after switching among several analytical tabs during a single session.

steps.description: Toggle the sidebar open if it is collapsed
Load historical data for the selected asset
Switch between several different analytical tabs
Verify the Neon Quant Plotly price chart is still displayed and populated

title: View Raw Data table after loading an asset
description: This test verifies that after loading a valid asset, the Raw Data tab shows a populated time series table for the same selected asset/time range.

steps.description: Toggle the sidebar open if it is collapsed
Load historical data for the selected asset
Switch to the Raw Data tab
Verify the raw time series data table is populated

title: Run an ARIMA forecast and see dashed overlay plus horizon metrics
description: This test verifies that with a loaded asset, running an ARIMA forecast produces a dashed-line forecast overlay on the chart and displays forecast horizon metrics.

steps.description: Toggle the sidebar open if it is collapsed
Load historical data for the selected asset
Provide a reasonable historical window and valid ARIMA parameters
Verify a dashed-line forecast overlay is displayed on the price chart
Verify forecast horizon metrics are displayed

title: Run RSI backtest and see metrics plus equity curve vs Buy & Hold
description: This test verifies that with a loaded asset, running the RSI backtest with valid starting capital populates performance metrics and renders an equity curve compared to Buy & Hold.

steps.description: Toggle the sidebar open if it is collapsed
Load historical data for the selected asset
Fill a valid positive starting capital amount into the capital field
Verify Total Return and Win Rate values are displayed
Verify an equity curve comparison chart versus Buy & Hold is displayed

title: Compare all forecast models and see multiple distinct overlays
description: This test verifies that the compare-all-models action renders multiple dashed-line forecast overlays for side-by-side comparison and displays corresponding horizon outputs.

steps.description: Toggle the sidebar open if it is collapsed
Load historical data for the selected asset
Verify multiple distinct dashed-line forecast overlays are displayed on the chart
Verify forecast comparison outputs are displayed

title: Selected asset context persists when switching tabs
description: This test verifies that after loading an asset, switching across analytical tabs keeps the same asset context without unexpectedly clearing charts or data views.

steps.description: Toggle the sidebar open if it is collapsed
Load historical data for the selected asset
Switch back to the Overview tab
Verify the selected-asset price chart and/or metrics are still displayed without being reset

title: Reloading with a different asset updates the primary chart
description: This test verifies that after loading one asset, selecting a different asset and reloading updates the chart to the newly selected asset rather than continuing to show the prior one.

steps.description: Toggle the sidebar open if it is collapsed
Load historical data for the selected asset
Select a different asset in the same market
Load historical data for the newly selected asset
Verify the primary price chart updates to reflect the newly selected asset

title: Switch to Mean Reversion strategy and see outputs update
description: This test verifies that after running one strategy, switching to Mean Reversion and running again updates the metrics and equity curve to the new strategy results.

steps.description: Toggle the sidebar open if it is collapsed
Load historical data for the selected asset
Fill a valid positive starting capital amount into the capital field
Verify backtest metrics are displayed for the latest run
Verify the equity curve comparison chart is displayed for the latest run

title: Analyze pasted headlines to get per-item sentiment and aggregated news pulse
description: Verifies a user can paste multiple headlines, run sentiment analysis, and see per-item polarity/subjectivity results plus an aggregated news pulse.

steps.description: Fill the sentiment text area with multiple distinct headline lines
Verify per-item sentiment results are displayed
Verify an aggregated news pulse summary is displayed

title: Fetch and analyze recent headlines to render sentiment trend and news pulse
description: Verifies a user can fetch recent headlines, run analysis, and see an aggregated sentiment trend visualization and news pulse.

steps.description: Verify an aggregated sentiment trend visualization is displayed
Verify an aggregated news pulse summary is displayed

title: Re-run sentiment analysis after editing pasted headlines updates results
description: Verifies that after an initial sentiment run, changing the input text and running again updates the displayed per-item results and aggregated pulse.

steps.description: Fill the sentiment text area with multiple headline lines
Update the sentiment text area by replacing it with different headline lines
Verify per-item sentiment results are displayed
Verify an aggregated news pulse summary is displayed

title: Recover from empty-input validation by providing text and successfully analyzing
description: Verifies that after seeing the empty-input validation error, providing valid headlines and re-running produces sentiment results and a news pulse.

steps.description: Fill the sentiment text area with multiple headline lines
Verify per-item sentiment results are displayed
Verify an aggregated news pulse summary is displayed

title: Invalid custom ticker shows validation error and avoids stale outputs
description: This test verifies that entering an invalid custom ticker and attempting to load data shows a validation error and does not leave previously loaded charts/metrics presented as current.

steps.description: Toggle the sidebar open if it is collapsed
Enter a custom ticker value that is clearly invalid
Load historical data for the custom ticker
Verify a ticker validation error is displayed
Verify the main chart/metrics are not shown as populated for the invalid ticker

title: Insufficient historical data for a model shows validation error
description: This test verifies that selecting a forecasting model with an insufficient historical window and running the forecast shows a validation error rather than producing misleading outputs.

steps.description: Toggle the sidebar open if it is collapsed
Load historical data for the selected asset
Select a forecasting model that requires more data
Set the historical window to a very small value
Verify an insufficient-data validation error is displayed

title: Negative capital input is rejected with validation error
description: This test verifies that entering a negative capital amount for a backtest displays a validation error and prevents running the simulation with invalid capital.

steps.description: Toggle the sidebar open if it is collapsed
Load historical data for the selected asset
Fill a negative value into the capital field
Verify a capital validation error is displayed

title: Show validation when attempting sentiment analysis with empty input
description: Verifies that requesting sentiment analysis with an empty text area shows a validation error prompting for input.

steps.description: Verify a validation error prompting for input is displayed

title: Non-numeric capital input is rejected with validation error
description: This test verifies that entering a non-numeric value for starting capital displays a validation error and prevents running the backtest.

steps.description: Toggle the sidebar open if it is collapsed
Load historical data for the selected asset
Fill a non-numeric value into the capital field
Verify a capital validation error is displayed
